# Ipv6 cidr membership (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Ipv6 cidr membership.

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | filter is_ipv6(src_ip) = true | alter v6_match = incidr6(src_ip, "2001:0db8:85a3:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000/48, fe80:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000:0000/10") | fields src_ip, v6_match
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
